message:
test(io): add SplitReader and PendingBetweenChunksReader test helpers for Lines

Provides two new AsyncBufRead test implementations:
- SplitReader: delivers pre-defined byte chunks one at a time, useful
  for testing how Lines handles line boundaries that fall across read
  boundaries
- PendingBetweenChunksReader: returns Poll::Pending between each chunk,
  exercising the cooperative-yield and re-poll paths in the Lines state
  machine

These are test-only infrastructure (gated behind #[cfg(test)]) for
exercising edge cases in stream-based line splitting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
